kpis: Khimki Moscow Region points per poss.
insights: Possession types are inferred, not native API fields.
This JSON is suitable both for Sankey rendering and later metrics expansion.
Real Madrid generated 0.98 points per possession over 97 tracked possessions.
Khimki Moscow Region generated 0.86 points per possession over 91 tracked possessions.
